sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2026-03-25 17:37
- Distance: 3.1 km
- Moving time: 20:25
- Elapsed time: 20:52
- Elevation gain: 50.2 m
- Average heart rate: 150.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 164 bpm
- Average watts: 191.5 W
- Average speed: 9.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `151.2 bpm`, ranging from `127.0` to `164.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `147.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `155.1 bpm` (+8.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `159.5 spm`, with a working range of `112.0` to `180.0 spm` after excluding `8` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `162.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `157.1 spm` (-5.6 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:38 /km` across `3.081 km` in `20:25` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:22 /km` and second-half pace was `6:52 /km` (+31 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `150.5 bpm` average and `164 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `145.8 bpm` in the first half and `154.9 bpm` in the second (+9.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `20:25` out of `20:52` elapsed (97.8%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `12` stop segments and `1.9%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `55.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `36.4 m` and `64.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `15.8 m` in the first half and `39.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
